programmes.show_description: Buckle up & join Nicky for a journey down the dark roads of rock! Monsters of metal, Ghastly Axe grinders & Devilish anthems. It's going to be a spine-tingling, HELL of a ride!
Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
These are power ladies who really rock! From Avril Lavigne and Pink to Amy Lee and Hayley Williams.
Over 7 hours and 3 decades of classic rock anthems back to back! Starting with Bon Jovi, Billy Idol & ZZ Top through to Razorlight, Green Day & the Foo Fighters!
A decade of mega hits and the loudest anthems! Expect Biffy Clyro, Linkin Park, Blink 182, Evanescence, Fall Out Boy & loads more!
From 1995 to 2009 - 30 minutes of the biggest rock songs from Green Day!
Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
Alex serves up 30 of the greatest, darkest, skinny jeans-iest, heavy eye makeup-iest & back-combed hair-iest anthems from the worlds most glorious miserable genre!
Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
50 of the the biggest most uplifting, feel good rock songs! With anthems from Jet, Queen, Kiss and David Bowie.
Claire Sturgess relives the 2010s with her 30 greatest heroes in rock and indie. The Vaccines, Biffy Clyro and Imagine Dragons are all in the Top 10, but who is her number 1?
Claire Sturgess relives the 2010s with her 30 greatest heroes in rock and indie. The Vaccines, Biffy Clyro and Imagine Dragons are all in the Top 10, but who is her number 1?
Sing-along classics & rock party anthems all night long. Crazy, Crazy, Crazy party nights featuring KISS, Queen, Meatloaf, Kaiser Chiefs and Foo Fighters to name just a few!
Your weekend anthems and the biggest rock songs from the last 50 years! From the Beatles and the Stones in the 60s right through to One Republic and Kings Of Leon in the 10s.
From 1991 to 1994 - 40 minutes of the biggest rock songs from the legendary Kurt Cobain!
Number 1 rock songs from the last 50 years! With mega hits from the Arctic Monkeys & KOL right back to legends like The Stones & T.Rex!
Standby to pay homage to the best front men and leading ladies that the world of rock has produced! From Grace Slick and Christine McVie to Ozzy Osbourne and Jimi Hendrix.
Turn it up to 11 all weekend for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
25 All-Killer 00s Dumbass Anthems! From Blink-182 and Wheatus to Fall Out Boy and Scouting For Girls.
A decade of mega hits and the loudest anthems! Expect Biffy Clyro, Linkin Park, Blink 182, Evanescence, Fall Out Boy & loads more!
Turn up your speakers to 11 and live life even louder! Emo Anthems in order from Linkin Park in 2000 to The My Chemical Romance at the end of the Decade!
Turn it up to 11 all weekend for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
25 of the greatest rock bands of the noughties featuring Paramore, Bullet For My Valentine, Slipknot and My Chemical Romance.
Turn it up to 11 all weekend for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
These rebellious teens rocked every college campus throughout the 90s and 00s. Expect great tunes from Blink-182, Wheatus, Good Charlotte and many more!
Turn your amp up to 11 & make your mic roar! Here come 25 of the greatest 00s rock karaoke tracks. Featuring The Killers, Fall Out Boy, Arctic Monkeys & many more!
Your weekend anthems and the biggest rock songs from the last 50 years! From the Beatles and the Stones in the 60s right through to One Republic and Kings Of Leon in the 10s.
50 legendary rock tracks you absolutely know - but how fast can you name them? One thing's for sure: after the first riff, they'll be stuck in your head all night long!
